commentDocLens.commands.toggle.title: Comment Doc Lens: Toggle
commentDocLens.commands.refresh.title: Comment Doc Lens: Refresh
commentDocLens.commands.showLanguageStat: Comment Doc Lens: Show Language Status
commentDocLens.commands.copyDiagnosticsF: Comment Doc Lens: Copy Diagnostics for Issue
commentDocLens.commands.explainHiddenHin: Comment Doc Lens: Explain Hidden Hint
commentDocLens.commands.openSampleGaller: Comment Doc Lens: Open Sample Gallery
commentDocLens.configuration.enabled.des: Enable Comment Doc Lens inlay hints.
commentDocLens.configuration.languages.d: Registered adapter language identifiers where Comment Doc Lens runs. This setting filters supported adapter languages; unknown language identifiers are ignored.
commentDocLens.configuration.languageOve: Per-language Comment Doc Lens settings keyed by VS Code language identifier. For example: { "python": { "enabled": false } }.
Enable or disable Comment Doc Lens for this language.
commentDocLens.configuration.maxLineLeng: Maximum source line length scanned for candidate symbols. Longer lines are skipped to avoid expensive lookups in generated or minified files.
commentDocLens.configuration.maxHintLeng: Maximum length of the inline comment summary.
commentDocLens.configuration.maxHintsPer: Maximum number of hints produced per inlay hint request.
Maximum inline documentation hints shown on one source line after candidate priority ranking.
commentDocLens.configuration.minIdentifi: Minimum identifier length before hints are shown unless documentation includes a definition location.
commentDocLens.configuration.minimumDocu: Minimum number of words required in a documentation summary before it can be shown.
commentDocLens.configuration.preferPrope: Prefer the final identifier in property chains, such as baz in foo.bar.baz.
commentDocLens.configuration.dedupeLineH: Deduplicate repeated inlay hint summaries on the same line.
commentDocLens.configuration.resolveTime: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for a single documentation lookup.
commentDocLens.configuration.maxCacheEnt: Maximum number of cached documentation lookup results.
Prefix displayed before each inline documentation summary.
commentDocLens.configuration.enableHintI: Enable inlay hint label tooltips and definition locations when documentation lookup provides them. Details are resolved lazily when VS Code asks for them.
